title: Defra outcomes table (reference style)
intro: This table emulates the source reference document structure: 20 outcomes with DG owner, outcome owner (SRO), and supporting notes.
rows: Housing and infrastructure that is environmentally positive
Built environment and development interface with nature outcomes.
Marine environment and sustainable seas outcome.
A resilient, reliable and safe supply of water to homes and businesses
Profitable and resilient food sector that provides affordable, nutritious food
Food system resilience, affordability and nutrition outcome.
Trade barriers with the EU reduced for food, plants and animals
EU trading relationship outcome (SPS and market access).
Increased trade that supports domestic production (high food standards) and downward pressure on food prices
Protection from pollution and environmental hazards
Pollution, chemicals, air and wider environmental hazards outcome.
Minimal waste, maximum use of resources
Resources and waste / circular economy outcome (owner to be confirmed).
Emergency preparedness and response to environmental incidents, disease outbreaks, food and water supply shocks
Reforming our water system so it drives growth, protects consumers and enhances the environment
Not specified (water outcomes list David Hallam as SRO)
Often presented as an umbrella theme alongside outcomes 4 and 5; include only if your framework version counts it as an outcome.
